name: animal-badge
label: 动物徽标 / Animal Badge
preamble: Cute minimal flat-vector animal mascot emblems: each animal a friendly geometric character centered inside a soft rounded-square badge, limited harmonious pastel palette, thick clean shapes.

construction.grid: shared badge shape and size; centered character
construction.fill_rule: flat-vector character on a soft rounded-square tile
construction.color_rule: limited harmonious pastel palette; one tint per tile
construction.shared_parts: consistent facial proportions and character style; identical badge frame

fits: Avatar pickers, kids' and social products.
notes: Output is a coloured badge tile (the badge is the silhouette), not an isolated subject.
